title: Overpacked
body:
### ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1432167/description_2c9b6fdb-4233-4421-9e16-a60c15d968db.png) ### ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1432167/description_6b5403dc-f6fb-4a04-9ea1-47db003e585c.png) ### Overpacked adds huge backpacks with a capacity roughly equal to **four chests**, allowing you to carry **many more items** on your adventures. The backpack helps you store loot and **organize it into different sections**, making inventory management **more convenient and well-structured**. ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1432167/description_9f7c8ac0-0fe5-4250-8ec7-eb428a659c56.png)![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1432167/description_9827cad1-794e-4eab-8b83-7a4ca1c74e0a.png) [![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1432167/description_e5504b6a-726a-409c-91cc-c83b66cfb534.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/curios) ### ###

• To obtain a **giant backpack**, you need to purchase it from a **Wandering Trader**. ![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8b9e9b7cddc3af900ca09a6723a3feec7a683123.png) • Customization: You can recolor the backpack in any of the **16 vanilla colors** or decorate it with a **sleeping bag** by clicking on it with a bed or a sleeping bag from the Comforts ![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/53810824df00b04d316fc62cbf4ab0d6fe619713.png) or [Upgrade Aquatic](https://modrinth.com/mod/upgrade-aquatic) ![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/27bb9b2dcf7c31110482748325f09521988126ac_0.webp) mods. ### • Beautiful animations: Animations are played while walking and when opening the backpack. ### • Roomy inventory: Each backpack consists of **three sections**: one large section with **54 slots** and two smaller ones with **27 slots each**. Each section is a separate inventory. ### • Balance: The backpack will start to **slow you down** if you fill it with too many items. The slowdown depends on the number of occupied slots: **for every 27 filled slots, you lose 10% of your speed**. ### • Funny mechanics: You can **stand on the backpack**, and if you sit in a boat with a mob and then put the backpack on, the mob will be **pushed out of the boat**. ### ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1432167/description_87f711d5-0a6d-4ebb-9cb7-30f9eee631e2.png) ### • Are there any backports? Fabric support? Support for ports and other bootloaders is planned for a later time. ### • Can I use Overpacked in a modpack or other content? Yes! Just don’t forget to credit us properly. ### • Can I use Overpacked textures or other assets? Only in certain cases — please contact us via our Discord server. [![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1432167/description_4549c881-22d7-4ae3-9343-e3b2f8fba6a6.png)](https://modrinth.com/organization/nycto-team)
